{{Dialogue|Tahiri Veila|The warriors […] didn't realize that Nom Anor was turning down a challenge. I told them you were the slayer of Shedao Shai.|Corran Horn|Good going, Tahiri. Now what?|Tahiri Veila|The head warrior of this bunch—Shok Choka—wants to take up the challenge.|Corran Horn|Tell him I accept.|Anakin Solo|No. Tell him ''I'' accept.|attr=[[Tahiri Veila]] delivers Shok Choka's challenge|src=<ref name="Rebirth" />}}
'''Shok Choka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]]. He was the leader of a boarding party aboard a [[Yag-prime|space station]] in the [[Yag'Dhul system/Legends|Yag'Dhul system]]. He challenged [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] to a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]], but [[Anakin Solo]] took Corran's place. During the fight Shok Choka swept Anakin's legs from under him. He tried to punch him but overcommitted. In the split second he had to decide whether to roll forward or get back up, Anakin responded by cutting his head off. Tall for a Yuuzhan Vong, Choka's personal scars included three large chevrons on each ear, and a scar that ran from his chin, through his lips, up to his skull.<ref name="Rebirth" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
